name: repo-agent-rules
description: Install fixed repo-local AGENTS.md and engineering rule docs for coding agents.

interface.longDescription: Installs a fixed AGENTS.md and fixed engineering rule docs. It asks only for project type and main push policy, and does not inspect repository source to generate custom documentation or install tooling.
defaultPrompt: Use repo-agent-rules to install AGENTS.md and the fixed engineering rule docs in this repository.
Create AGENTS.md and related docs with repo-agent-rules.
